verses.text: Our Father, God, who art in heav’n, All hallowed be thy name! Thy kingdom come, thy will be done, In earth and heav’n the same!
Give us this day our daily bread; And as we those forgive Who sin against us, so may we Forgiving grace receive.
Into temptation leads us not; From evil set us free; For thine the kingdom, thine the powr’ And glory ever be! Amen!
